Which Touring Bike Do You Need?

A decision flowchart for every type of UK rider

START: What's your riding style?

🛣️ Mostly Tarmac

Do you prioritise comfort or speed?

Comfort

Long distances, pillions, luggage?

Full Tourer
BMW R 1300 RT, Honda Gold Wing

Speed

Spirited B-roads, sport feel?

Sport Tourer
Yamaha Tracer 9 GT, Kawasaki Ninja 1000SX

🌲 Mixed Terrain

How much off-road will you do?

Green Lanes

Farm tracks, forest roads?

Adventure Bike
BMW R 1300 GS, Triumph Tiger 1200

Light Trails

Occasional gravel, mainly road?

Crossover ADV
Suzuki V-Strom 800, Honda CB500X

💰 Budget Matters

First tourer or tight budget?

Budget Tourer
Kawasaki Versys 650, Suzuki V-Strom 650

🏍️ Solo & Light

Minimal luggage, nimble handling?

Naked Tourer
Triumph Speed 400, Yamaha MT-07
